name: Ecovyst Inc.
business: Ecovyst Inc. is a leading integrated provider of virgin and regenerated sulfuric acid products and services. The company provides sulfuric acid recycling (regeneration services) to North American refineries for alkylate production, and produces virgin sulfuric acid for water treatment, mining, and industrial applications. It also offers treatment services for hazardous/non-hazardous wastes and ex-situ catalyst activation for hydro-processing catalysts.

exposures.sentence: We are a leading integrated provider of virgin and regenerated sulfuric acid products and services.
We are a leading provider of sulfuric acid recycling (regeneration services) and end-to-end logistics to North American refineries to support the production of alkylate.
We provide ex-situ sulfiding and pre-activation for hydro-processing catalysts, which are used in the production of traditional and sustainable fuels.

catalysts.event: Expanded virgin and regenerated sulfuric acid services capacity through purchase of Cornerstone assets in Waggaman, Louisiana
catalysts.sentence: In May 2025, we expanded our virgin and regenerated sulfuric acid services capacity through our purchase of the sulfuric acid production assets of Cornerstone Chemical Company LLC (Cornerstone) located in Waggaman, Louisiana.

catalysts.event: Completed sale of Advanced Materials & Catalysts segment
catalysts.sentence: Effective on December 31, 2025, we completed the sale of our Advanced Materials & Catalysts segment, which includes our investment in affiliated companies, Zeolyst International and Zeolyst C.V. (collectively, the Zeolyst Joint Venture) to Technip Energies N.V. for a purchase price of $556.0 million.
